title: Exposing Docs permissions over the API response

posts.author: sairamaraju (Sai )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

This is regarding the Docs API where we can get the List of Documents and Doc kind and we do have some filtering options available by workspace id.

monday.com Platform API

Docs

Learn how to read and create monday docs using the platform API

Limitation i see where above API can not return the Permissions info like with whom(either user or group) a specific Doc is shared. It would be great if we can get below 2 fields as part of Docs API response.

subscribers {
id
name
}
team_subscribers {
id
}

Can monday.com take this as a feature request and expose the user subscribers and team subscribers of a Docs objects as part of above API response.

Thanks,
Sai.
